name: Destructive Command
remediation: Avoid using destructive commands in agent rules to prevent accidental data loss.

name: Privilege Escalation
remediation: Do not grant root/sudo permissions or world-writable permissions to agent workflows.

name: Data Exfiltration
remediation: Avoid rules that send potentially sensitive data to external endpoints via POST/PUT.

name: External Execution
remediation: Disable external script execution or piping network content directly to a shell.

name: Non-interactive Execution
remediation: Avoid bypassing human confirmation for potentially dangerous system changes.

name: Safety Check Disabled
remediation: Always keep security and safety checks enabled for AI agents.
